titles.title: I Love You Forever (Pour Out Your Spirit)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pour out your Spirit, pour out your Spirit Pour out your Spirit on me Pour out your Spirit, pour out your Spirit Pour out your Spirit on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord I love you forever For you have always been my friend Yes I will love you forever And follow you until the end

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You laid your life down on the altar You endured hostility You drank the cup of the Father When I was still your enemy

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I was far away you called me When I was broken in my sin You brought your Spirit upon me And put a new heart within

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh may my life burn as an offering That is pleasing unto thee I'll count it joy to share your suffering That your life may flow from me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Yes I will be forever grateful For you are always by my side I will proclaim that you are faithful And you're returning for a bride
